route.description: Current Expo Router route for the playground app

recording-state.description: Current recorder state mirrored into the playground agentic bridge

filename-input.description: Current value of the filename input on the record screen
filename-input.expression: JSON.stringify((function(){ var fiber = globalThis.__AGENTIC__?.findFiberByTestId?.('filename-input'); var props = fiber && fiber.memoizedProps ? fiber.memoizedProps : null; return { value: props && props.value != null ? String(props.value) : null }; })())
